$schema_doc: Cross-language brain registry compliance fixture. Both Python and TypeScript consume this. CI fails on any disagreement.

expected.capabilities_first_line: Searches the web for current information using a query string.
expected.execution_order_first: Validate that query is a non-empty string

expected.capabilities_first_line: Reads the contents of a file at an absolute or relative path.
expected.execution_order_first: Validate path argument is a non-empty string

expected.capabilities_first_line: Writes a string to a file at the specified path.
Fetches the full text content of a URL.
expected.execution_order_first: Validate URL format (must start with https://)

expected.capabilities_first_line: Performs an HTTP GET request to a given HTTPS URL and returns the response body.
expected.execution_order_first: Validate URL format — must start with https:// or http://

expected.capabilities_first_line: Executes a deterministic computation on a given input value.
expected.execution_order_first: Validate input type and value (within declared range)

expected.capabilities_first_line: Searches a text body for a pattern and returns all matching spans.
expected.execution_order_first: Validate text body size (must be <= 10 MB)

expected.capabilities_first_line: Extracts one or more values from a JSON string using dot-path notation.
expected.execution_order_first: Validate input is a non-empty string

cases.name: validate-fail-missing-tool
cases.input_content:
VERSION: 1.0

CAPABILITIES:
Does something useful.

LIMITATIONS:
Has some limits.

FAILURE MODES:
Fails sometimes.

BEST PRACTICES:
Do things right.

EXECUTION ORDER:
1. Step one
2. Step two

OUTPUT CONTRACT:
{"result": "string"}

GENOME SECTIONS:
IDENTITY: Chars 0-7 = ID tag. Chars 8-9 = gen. Chars 10-19 = ns. Chars 20-63 = family.
EXECUTION: Char 0 = retry. Char 1 = backoff. Chars 2-63 = flow + padding.
BEHAVIOR: Char 0 = escalation mode. Chars 1-63 = label + contract.
CHECKSUM: FNV-1a hash of sections 0-2.

VARIABLES:
task: The task description
input: The input value
